messages.body: Please don’t worry about that — the invoice was generated automatically, which is why you received it, but my team has already been updated about the cancellation.

Ok
im available now
Let me give you a quick call in the next 40 mins and help you out with the process:)
Could you let me know if you’re available tomorrow so I can help you out with this process.
thats what i wanted and missed the call
is my subscription cancelled?

Just a quick update — all the changes we discussed have been made on the profile, including the membership plans, packages, and the smaller tweaks. If you have some time tomorrow, we can talk about the domain transfer an…
Hey Veronica,  I hope you’re well! We can definitely schedule a meeting for tomorrow if you have sometime?
Hello?
Did we have a upcoming meeting?
Hey Veronica, could you please give us access on domain@zoca.com

Hey Veronica, As discussed on the call, the changes will be reflected soon. Please do give me a heads-up once you have an update about the domain.
Hey Veronica, we have a meeting scheduled for today. I’ll help you out over the call:)
Hey Veronica! I’ve put together a few creatives for the offer — I’m excited for you to check them out! Let me know which ones you like or if there’s anything you’d like me to tweak.
Okay thabks
Today I would like to touch back on the logo change, prices, the memberships and packages. Also owning the domain. merging the google business profiles together also
ive recieved a review but it is located on the google profile that was associated to my personal email. can the profiles be merged together?
